description: Inheritance-Merge E2E Tests shipped. The inheritance-merge fixture now uses semantic upstream/consumer names with deferred YAML auto-merge ops, tests/cli_e2e_inheritance_merge.rs covers base, intermediate, overlay, and consumer chain depths, the stale local-fs smoke test was removed, cargo nextest run passed, cargo nextest run --features integration-tests passed, and ./script/ci passed. Observed merge semantics are downstream-first accumulation with top_level_key 1.0 at intermediate, overlay, and consumer; list order [beta, fnord, alpha] at intermediate and [carrot, fnord, beta, alpha] at overlay and consumer; and nested repo order downstream-first. Design: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-15-inheritance-merge-e2e-design.md. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-15-inheritance-merge-e2e.md.
